feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RAP Translation Issue – XLF Maintained but Labels Not Reflecting in SAP Public cloud UI
entry.content:
RAP Translation Issue in S/4HANA Public Cloud – XLF Not Reflecting

Hello Experts,

I’m facing an issue with translations in a managed RAP application (S/4HANA Public Cloud).

What I did

  • Maintained translations via XLF file for Metadata Extension/CDS labels using the Maintain Translations app (Development tenant)

  • Uploaded and activated successfully

  • Logged in with the target language

❗Issue

Translations are not reflecting in the UI (still showing source/English language)

  • Labels are defined using @EndUserText.label

  • Fields are exposed via UI annotations

Additional Info

  • Attaching:

    • Screenshot of metadata translation (XLF)

    • Maintain Translations app by uploading the XIF and Publishing the same.

    • Logon language showing target language but no translation in UI

Question

Are there any specific limitations or additional steps in RAP (Public Cloud) for translations to work, or is there any additional actions required?

Any suggestion or best practices would be really helpful.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Credit Note & Debit Note all amount still show positive in standard CDS view
entry.content:
We are using the standard CDS View I_BillingDocPrcgElmntBasic in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. In this standard CDS view, all amount fields (including pricing elements and quantity-related amounts) are displayed as positive values, regardless of the billing document type - G2, CBRE, L2.

However, from a business perspective: Credit Notes (returns) should reflect negative values and Debit Notes should reflect positive values.

Currently, the system does not differentiate the sign based on billing document type, and there is no standard field or configuration available to derive the correct sign.

We would like to clarify if

Is there any standard logic, field, or CDS view available that provides signed values for billing document pricing elements?

If not, is there a recommended approach from SAP to derive the correct sign (e.g., based on billing document type or pricing condition)?

entry.title: ZERO base price requirement in sales order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I have designed internal repair process where orders are created from sales force quotation and converted into SO. But as per our business there are repair products which are created as non stock NLAG but these are actual meant for text items.
Now out business needs these itesm to be just for text represent in sales order and dont carry price but fact is PPR0 base price is mandatory in sales order type "OR".

I have tried alternate solution based on item category determination of TATX but to for this need to leave blank item category group in customer master sales data which is not possible because the item category group is mandatory.
So how feasible to get ZERO pricing for such kind of products?
which material type to be used?
Are there any other method in S4 hana public cloud to make ZERO condition records acceptance in sales order.
Example order 1413 with product/material : Repair Damage broken (5582199031)
Because of system don't accept ZERO pricing , we

entry.title: add new tax classification sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

i want to ask is it possible to create a new tax classification in sap public cloud ? if we can create a new one, where to maintain it ? is it in img or cbc ? I already check it its already maintain code for government but is it possible to create a new one tax classification code ?

 

Thankyou

entry.title: How to increase the length of the ODN in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
entry.content:
Hi Team,
is it possible to increase the length of ODN number in SAP Public Cloud

entry.title: Issue with Location-Level Restriction Not Working
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are currently working on implementing restrictions at the storage location level. Our requirement is that once a specific location is restricted, users should not be able to create any entries for that location.

We have already applied restrictions at the user role level; however, the restriction is not working as expected. The user is still able to make entries for the restricted location in MIGO.

Could you please assist us in understanding how we can properly restrict users at the location level to prevent such entries?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: How to Get a View of Supplier Payments and Customer Collections in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working with a customer in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud who needs a way to obtain a weekly forecast of incoming and outgoing payments, and ideally view everything within a single application. Specifically, they are looking for a tool or report that allows them to:

  • See which supplier invoices need to be paid in the following week and in the weeks after.

  • See which customer invoices are expected to be collected during those same weeks.

The purpose is to help them better plan their cash requirements.

The customer needs a forward-looking view based on the due dates of open items, but organized by future weeks (week +1, week +2, week +3, etc.).

I have reviewed the standard apps for supplier and customer open items, as well as cash flow apps, but I have not found any functionality that presents this information together in a single application.

Is there any standard app, report, or functionality in Public Cloud that provides this weekly forecast of payments and collections?

Any guidance or experience you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Custom Workflow for Purchase Requisition Based on Header Custom Field in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have added custom fields in the workflow  of Purchase Requisition conditions and the same custom fields are also available at the header level of the Purchase Requisition. My requirement is to trigger a custom workflow in the Create Purchase Requisition – Advanced App  based on the values of those custom fields.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #2602 @ALL

entry.title: SAP Sellers & SIs: Where Deals Slip and Untracked Execution Risk
entry.content:
Something I’ve noticed working with SAP system integrators in regulated markets: Deals don’t usually slip at procurement because of relationships or pricing.

They slip because of untracked execution risk.

Especially in complex enterprise deals where sales, delivery, and compliance all intersect.

A few observations:

  • A compliance or procurement certificate lapses weeks before submission
  • A regulatory change (tax, reporting, or industry-specific requirement) wasn’t factored into the solution
  • A board-level or ministry stakeholder with approval authority was never engaged
  • A localisation gap (discovered late in S/4 or integration scope) surfaces after signature

None of these are big issues on their own and yes, strong teams should catch them.

But across long-cycle SAP deals with multiple stakeholders, systems, and regulatory layers, it’s not always that no one is watching, it’s that there’s too much to track across too many moving parts. 

Does anyone else feel this pain?

I’ve been speaking with SAP practice leads and enterprise sellers navigating this across regions, especially in regulated industries like finance, oil and gas, and pharma.

Curious to hear from others here: Where have you seen deals slip late in the process and what was the root cause?

entry.title: Use APP Create Payment Requisitions to Query open payables with payment amount information
entry.content:
Use APP  Create Payment Requisitions to Query open payables with payment amount information

We need to provide the list of this query result as an interface for external systems to call. How can we quickly obtain the corresponding CDS and its relationships for this result?

entry.title: I want to have a list of all the apps that the user can access in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I want to have a list of all the apps that the user can access in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
Please provide me with several ways to obtain this list.


Thank you so much.

entry.title: Automatically update the storage location at the sales order line item level
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to automatically update the storage location during sales order creation and upon saving for specific ship‑to party customers.

Is it possible to achieve this functionality within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Regards,

Kasirajan

entry.title: Tax Debit Journal Billing SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

i have requirement when we create billing theres will be another tax value in the debit column line 4 (VAT-out Wapu Account) like in this picture

 

is it possible to make it with SAP standard Public Cloud or must i make another condition type and put it into the pricing procedure so the debit tax will be added automatically when billing and journal created ?

if there any standard to add in to debit coloumn without configure, please tell how to make it

thankyou

entry.title: Excess Quantity Not Allowed For Production Order
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

While do the Enter the time ticket for the Production order tile (Confirmation of Production order-CO11N) below error is showing. How to solve this error?

" Message no. MBND_CLOUD027 - Excess Quantity Not Allowed For Production Order"

i will increase my component required qty. 

Thanks,
Siva Marishan.,

entry.title: 科目余额表导出变式
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

当我使用APP”显示总账科目余额-摘要/日记账分录视图“时

  1. 设置了layout, 但导出仍然没有按我需要的layout导出, 请问是否有地方可以设置？
  2. 导出的数字Format都是Text, 需要手工转化为Number, 请问是否可以改善or设置？

谢谢

entry.title: Fetch Production Order after reading QM Notification 'Reference No' (QM01) in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud 'Create Quality Notification' for Q3, what would be the method to:

  • Read Serial Number from 'NOTIFICATIONEXTREFERENCENUMBER'
  • Fetch Production Order via 'I_SERIALNUMBERMANUFACTURINGORD' and
  • Update QM notification

Unable to find related BADI.

entry.title: What is the difference between Actual costing and material cost estimate?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could anyone please help clarify the difference between Actual Costing (CKMLCP) and Material Cost Estimate (CK11N)?

From my understanding, both seem to update the material cost, which is where my confusion arises. I’m trying to understand:

  • What is the specific purpose of each?
  • When should each be used?
  • How do both processes coexist without conflict?

I would really appreciate a detailed explanation to help me better understand this.

Thank you in advance!

Best Regards,

Nithin

entry.title: Clarification on Downpayment Payment Workflow Behavior in SAP
entry.content:
I would like to understand how to cancel parked documents created in the *Verify Supplier Down Payment Requests, particularly when the verification has been rejected.

Unfortunately, the flow described here does not provide any information on handling parked documents:Approval Workflows for Supplier Down Payment Requests | SAP Help Portal

I also attempted to use the *Display Parked Document, but received the error message:'Document 2210/15000000XX/2025 was created using Fiori applications; no processing.' The message suggests using the *Verify General Journal Entry, but the document cannot be selected there.

Is there a way to cancel a parked document for a supplier down payment request?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic Payment Allocation (Vendor) not working after upload of Bank Statement (XML, CAMT V8)
entry.content:
Hello together,

using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we would expect the automatic payment allocation after uploading a bank statement in CAMT-Format to work from the beginning right away. We have matching Vendor/Supplier and matching Bank Account Data both in the Business Partner Master Data and the Bank Statement File.

This is the starting situation:

In the supplier master data, the exact name and bank account of the supplier are configured ("IBAN", "SWIFT"). In the uploaded Bank file the exact name and IBAN of the supplier are mentioned in the correct fields of the file (XML, CAMT V8).

After the upload (with "Manage Bank Statements" App) the first check of the bank statment line items shows:

S/4HANA Cloud recognizes the IBAN and the Swift Code of the business partner (supplier) correctly. But it does not assign the correct Business Partner / Supplier in the Bank Statement Line Item. No open item for the payment is created or assigned/cancelled out to any open Item in the Vendor Account.

Partner Name, Payment Reference are both empty, Payment Amount is 0.00, Posting Status is "not completed" in the Bank Statement Line Item created in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Does the automatic payment allocation need more information? How can the automatic payment allocation be started correctly? Did we miss Configuration Steps in our System in order to get payment allocation running?

Thank You very much for Your help

entry.title: 2ET: Correct CBC Org Structure for Sales Org / Plant / Shipping Point?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am a junior consultant working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am currently documenting and testing several scope items for a sales scope we want to offer. My current focus is 2ET – Sales Order Processing for Non-Stock Material.

1. What exactly do we do in the system?

I tested the 2ET process in our customizing tenant and compared the findings with our development tenant.

Systems:

  • Stark Tower = customizing tenant

  • Arc Reactor = development tenant

Relevant process / step:

  • Scope item 2ET – Sales Order Processing for Non-Stock Material

  • especially the organizational prerequisites needed so sales processing works correctly

Relevant apps / objects:

  • Manage Sales Orders – Version 2

  • CBC Organizational Structure

  • CBC: Assign Sales Organization - Distribution Channel - Plant

  • shipping-point related CBC activities such as:

    • Define Shipping Point

    • Assign Shipping Points

    • Assign Shipping Points According to Storage Location

    • Define Rule for Determination of Shipping Point

My original operational issue was that in sales-order processing I could not get a usable shipping-point result for DE01, so I started checking and adjusting the setup in the customizing tenant. That led me deeper into CBC and the organizational structure.

2. What do I expect?

I expect that if the organizational structure is built correctly, then a sales organization such as DE01 should appear in CBC activity "Assign Sales Organization - Distribution Channel - Plant" and should also function correctly in the application afterwards.

My goal is to understand the minimum required org structure / hierarchy so I know when the sales organization should appear in that CBC configuration and when it becomes functionally usable in the system. This is the main reason for my question.

3. What actually happens?

What I see is inconsistent:

  • In Organizational Structure, DE01 is visible:

    • Company Code DE01

    • Sales Organization DE01

    • Sales Area DE01 / DE / 01

    • Plant DE01

    • Shipping Point DE01

    • Storage Location DE01

  • However, in CBC activity "Assign Sales Organization - Distribution Channel - Plant", DE01 is not listed at all.

A colleague explained to me that this assignment only appears if the hierarchy is correct and complete. If that is true, then DE01 may be visually present in Organizational Structure, but still structurally incomplete from CBC’s point of view.

That is exactly the inconsistency I am trying to understand.

4. Suspected cause

My current assumption is that the issue is caused by an inconsistent org structure / hierarchy in the customizing tenant.

More specifically:

  • parts of the structure were visible, but not all relationships seemed equally solid

  • DE01 did not appear in the CBC assignment where I would expect it

  • earlier we also saw cases where plant / shipping-related relationships looked disconnected or incomplete in Stark compared with Arc

At one point we also worked on shipping-point-related setup and org connections, because the issue first looked like a shipping-point problem. Later, a colleague suggested comparing the setup with the development tenant. In that comparison, the Arc Reactor structure looked much cleaner and more coherent than Stark Tower.

Development vs. customizing comparison

In Arc Reactor, the structure looks like a proper reference:

  • Sales Organization GE01 is connected cleanly

  • Sales Area GE01 / 10 / 00 is linked properly

  • Plant GE01 is integrated and linked with shipping points, storage locations, sales organizations, and purchasing organization

  • the corresponding CBC assignment is present

In Stark Tower, DE01 is visible in Organizational Structure, but the expected CBC-generated assignment is missing. That is why I suspect the issue is not just transactional, but structural.

My questions

  1. Which minimum org structure is required so that a sales organization appears in "Assign Sales Organization - Distribution Channel - Plant"?

  2. Which relationships must be correct between:

    • Company Code

    • Sales Organization

    • Sales Area

    • Distribution Channel

    • Division

    • Plant

    • Shipping Point

    • Storage Location

  3. If all those objects are visible in Organizational Structure, but the sales organization is still missing in that CBC activity, what does that usually mean?

  4. Does that clearly indicate an incomplete or inconsistent org hierarchy?

  5. Is there a reference example of a minimal correct hierarchy for such a setup in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

I attached screenshots from both systems and labeled them clearly as:

  • Arc Reactor (development tenant)

  • Stark Tower (customizing tenant)

My goal is not just to find a workaround, but to understand the correct structural prerequisite so I can rebuild or correct the customizing setup properly.

Thank you.

Screenshots:

Organizational Structure Customizing System (Stark Tower):

___________________________________________________________

Organizational Structure Development System (Arc Reactor):

___________________________________________________________

Assign Sales Organization - Distribution Channel – Plant (Configuration)
